text: I feel a spark of curiosity in this modern, well-lit space—part exhibition, part laboratory of ideas. Glass, clean lines, and screens hint at the boundary between public knowledge and private contemplation. The R+D wall invokes the relentless human drive to understand, innovate, and question. I'm drawn in, aware of the layers of reflection—literal and metaphorical—and find myself both observer and participant in an unfolding story of learning and invention. The carefully designed environment invites a reflective, almost anticipatory state of mind, as if something important could be discovered here.
